description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named Package and release that packages and releases a project on multiple platforms. The workflow should trigger on push events with tags, pull requests updating the workflow file, and a weekly schedule. It should have read permissions for repository contents and write permissions for jobs. Configure and run a matrix of jobs across various environments including Linux, FreeBSD, macOS, MinGW-w64, Visual Studio, and Android, each with specific steps for checking out code, setting up the environment, configuring and building the project, generating attestations, and uploading artifacts to releases.
